sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45759" key="e(fqo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑφθόω</orth>, <sense id="n45759.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roast, boil</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφιάλλω</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φιάλλω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
